LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LLOYD TRAN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ARE VOID. THE COMPLAINT DID NOT SUFFICIENTLY APPRISE DEFENDANT OF THE CLAIMS AGAINST HIM. MOREOVER, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUBSTITUTE SERVE DEFENDANT PROPERLY AT HIS DWELLING HOUSE OR USUAL ABODE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. ATTY. MAYMEI SZETO'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR DEFENDANT LLOYD TRAN is Granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint Of Deft Lloyd Tran
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Maymei Szeto, Esq., of Szeto Law Group, Tel. 415.337.0500, appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LLOYD TRAN'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint Of Defendant Lloyd Tran is Granted. The Court previously determined that the substitute service was defective. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-24-2012 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Maymei Szeto, Esq., from Szeto Law Group, 415-337-0500, for Defendant and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT LLOYD TRAN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is Granted. The default and default judgment are void. The complaint did not sufficiently apprise defendant of the claims against him. Moreover, plaintiff failed to substitute serve defendant properly at his dwelling house or usual abode.
Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
